# Eqho

> Free, offline voice-to-text dictation application that types directly into any focused window using local OpenAI Whisper models.

## Tech Stack
* Language: Python 3.10+
* Engine: OpenAI Whisper (via faster-whisper / CTranslate2)
* Hardware Acceleration: GPU-accelerated (NVIDIA CUDA 12.x) with automatic CPU fallback
* Environments: Windows 10/11 (primary), Linux X11, macOS

## Key Features & Differentiators
* **Universal Dictation:** Types into any focused application (Word, browsers, Slack, IDEs) via clipboard paste or simulated typing.
* **100% Local & Private:** No cloud, no accounts, no API keys. Audio never leaves the machine. 
* **Real-Time Pipeline:** Features a live transcription overlay and hallucination filtering (to prevent silence from being transcribed).
* **Customization:** Supports custom vocabulary, voice commands ("new line", "delete that"), text replacements, and volume ducking.
* **Multilingual:** 13 supported languages using models ranging from `tiny` (150 MB) to `large-v3` (3.1 GB). Default is `distil-large-v3`.

## Install & Run from Source
```bash
git clone [https://github.com/DanielMevit/Eqho.git](https://github.com/DanielMevit/Eqho.git)
cd Eqho
python -m venv venv && venv\Scripts\activate
pip install -r requirements.txt
python run.py
